news.headline: Canadian Ivey PMI Actual 47.1 (Forecast -, Previous 54.7)
Yum China Q4: Revenue misses at $2.595B, Total system sales rise 4%, Core operating profit up 35%, EPS beats estimates.
news.summary: Yum China Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:YUMC) saw a rise in shares following the release of its Q4 FY24 earnings report. In this period, the company recorded a 4% increase in revenue compared to the previous year, reaching $2.595 billion, slightly below the estimated $2.631 billion by analysts. Total system sales went up by 4% year-on-year, excluding currency impacts, attributed to a 5% growth in net new units. Same-store sales matched 99% of the prior year, with transactions at a 4% uptick. Within the brands, KFC observed a 5% increase in system sales, with a notable 16% surge in delivery sales amounting to about 42% of KFC’s Company sales. Pizza Hut experienced a 3% rise in system sales, with delivery sales climbing by 6% and contributing 42% to Pizza Hut’s Company sales. Core operating profit spiked by 35% and the margin widened by 140 basis points, reaching 5.8% compared to 4.4% from the same quarter the previous year. Adjusted earnings per share stood at $0.30, surpassing the expected $0.29. The company closed the quarter with $1.8 billion in cash and equivalents.

news.headline: CleanSpark to report Q1 earnings with focus on hash rate, Bitcoin holdings. Mined 626 BTC in Jan, avg hash rate ​​34.76 EH/s.
news.summary: CleanSpark, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLSK) is gearing up to announce its first-quarter financial results after markets close on Thursday. Shareholders are eagerly anticipating insights into the company's average hash rate, total Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) mined, and bitcoin holdings. In their January operational update, CleanSpark disclosed the mining of 626 bitcoin, a slight decrease from the 668 bitcoin mined in December. The average hash rate for CleanSpark in January measured at 34.76 EH/s, with an operating hash rate of 40.1 EH/s at the period's end. For reference, during the fourth quarter, CleanSpark had established a... (the complete story is available on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Aptiv PLC (NYSE:APTV) reports Q4 revenue of $4.91B, 1% YoY decrease, EPS $1.75 per share, shares rise on strong guidance.
news.summary: Shares of Aptiv PLC (NYSE:APTV) saw an increase in trading on Thursday following the release of their latest financial results and optimistic guidance. In the fourth quarter, the company reported a revenue of $4.91 billion, slightly surpassing estimates of $4.89 billion. Additionally, their adjusted earnings per share (EPS) for Q4 stood at $1.75, higher than the estimated $1.65 per share.Although total revenue experienced a 1% decrease compared to the previous year, Aptiv PLC generated $1.06 billion in cash flow from operations during the quarter. At the end of the quarter, the company held $1.6 billion in cash and cash equivalents.Going forward, Aptiv PLC is preparing to navigate through a dynamic market landscape. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Coherent Corp. beats Q2 estimates with sales of $1.44 billion, 17.3% share increase, 38.2% adjusted gross margin.
news.summary: Shares of Coherent Corp. (NYSE: COHR) are currently up by more than 17.3% as of the latest update on Thursday following the release of their strong second-quarter financial results. The company reported sales totaling $1.44 billion, surpassing the expected $1.37 billion. Additionally, their adjusted gross margin saw a year-over-year increase of 363 basis points to reach 38.2% in the quarter. Adjusted operating income also saw a significant surge, rising by 73.8% year-over-year to hit $265 million. The adjusted earnings per share stood at $0.95, exceeding the anticipated 69 cents. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Momentus Technologies partners with Diamond Baseball Holdings to improve ballpark operations and enhance fan experience in minor league clubs.
news.summary: Today, Momentus Technologies revealed a new partnership with Diamond Baseball Holdings (DBH), an entity overseeing several Minor League clubs connected to Major League Baseball. The agreement aims to enhance venue and event management services. Momentus Technologies is renowned in this field and this collaboration marks a significant step forward in their operations. The partnership is set to impact multiple clubs within the DBH network, showing promise for improved efficiency and success in the management of events and venues.

news.headline: Panama President: The decision to exit belt and road agreement with Beijing was made before Rubio’s visit.
Explore how DeFi is adapting to crypto regulation, stablecoins, and RWAs, revealed in the latest HTX Ventures report.
news.summary: According to recent data from HTX Ventures, the latest report delves into the impact of emerging crypto regulation, RWA, and stablecoin adoption on the evolution of decentralized finance (DeFi). The report highlights important trends and developments in DeFi, showcasing the significant influence of regulatory changes, RWA integration, and the increasing adoption of stablecoins in this space. The analysis underscores the shifting landscape of DeFi as these factors continue to shape the industry.

news.headline: FBS Global Limited prices IPO at US$4.50/share, totaling US$10,125,000 gross proceeds from 2,250,000 shares offered.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, FBS Global Limited, a green building contractor operating in Singapore, revealed the details of its initial public offering (IPO). The company, listed as "FBGL" on the NASDAQ, priced the Offering at 2,250,000 ordinary shares with a par value of US$0.001 each. These shares were priced at US$4.50 per share for the public. The total gross proceeds generated from this IPO amounted to US$10,125,000 for FBS Global, not inclusive of underwriting discounts and additional offering expenses. The projects undertaken by FBS Global showcase their commitment to sustainable construction practices by using environmentally responsible materials.

news.headline: Matt Meents joins Traction Capital as Strategic Growth Partner, supporting portfolio companies and future investments.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, Traction Capital welcomed Matt Meents as its new full-time Strategic Growth Partner. Meents will collaborate with current portfolio companies and assist in new investments for Traction.

news.headline: Moderna stock dropped as Senate Finance Committee voted on RFK Jr.'s HHS secretary nomination.
news.summary: Moderna's stocks fell significantly following the Senate Finance Committee's decision to advance Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s nomination as the HHS secretary to the full chamber. Questions arise about the company's future performance with this potential leadership change. The news raises concerns among investors and market analysts about the possible impacts on Moderna's financial growth prospects. Details surrounding the development and its implications are extensively covered in an article by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Amazon's Q4 results due, focus on AWS cloud business performance after rivals stumble. Stock may be influenced.
news.summary: The performance of Amazon's stock in the upcoming days is expected to be influenced by the results of the company's Q4, set to be released later this week. The focus will predominantly be on the growth of the AWS cloud business. As of now, the market is keeping a close watch on how Amazon's earnings compare, especially following setbacks experienced by Microsoft and Google.

news.headline: Bristol Myers Squibb beats Q4 earnings but shares fall 5% on light 2025 outlook post-earnings.
news.summary: On Thursday, Bristol Myers Squibb witnessed a significant drop in stock value as it provided a modest forecast for 2025, despite demonstrating strong performance in the fourth quarter. The company's shares plummeted by 5% following this update, causing concern among investors. This decline came after Bristol Myers Squibb reported impressive earnings for the fourth quarter, which had initially raised optimism.

news.headline: AstraZeneca stock increased after beating Q4 earnings views and giving positive guidance.
news.summary: AstraZeneca's stock saw an increase on Thursday following the company's better-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings report and optimistic forecasts for the future. The stock climbed after surpassing earnings expectations. The post highlighted AstraZeneca's positive performance in the last quarter and its promising outlook.

news.headline: Viking Therapeutics stock drops 8% on earnings report with incremental updates on weight-loss drugs.
news.summary: Viking Therapeutics experienced a significant 8% drop in its stock value at the start of Thursday trading due to its latest earnings report. The report primarily consisted of minor advancements regarding its weight-loss medications.

news.headline: Ralph Lauren hits record high after exceeding Q3 estimates and raising revenue guidance. Stock rallied early Thursday.
news.summary: Ralph Lauren's stock saw a significant increase in value at the start of trading on Thursday following the luxury lifestyle retailer surpassing Q3 estimates and raising its revenue forecast. This positive performance resulted in Ralph Lauren achieving a record high in stock value. The company's strong showing in Q3 and improved revenue outlook boosted investor confidence in the brand's growth prospects.

news.headline: CEO and Founder of Mercado Libre, Marcos Galperin, discusses the company's 25-year journey in a new podcast episode.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, Mercado Libre, a prominent e-commerce and fintech platform in Latin America, released the fifth episode of its podcast series titled "Inside Mercado Libre." In this specific episode, titled "Marcos Galperin on MELI's Culture," the CEO and founder Marcos Galperin was featured. The podcast, hosted by Investor Relations Officer Richard Cathcart, offers investors an exclusive opportunity to gain insights into the strategic perspectives of the company's executives. Mercado Libre is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol MELI.

news.headline: NFL legends Barry Sanders and Calvin Johnson will be at "Meet the Legends" event in Detroit, along with other Detroit Lions players.
news.summary: In Detroit on February 6, 2025, a special event called "Meet the Legends" is set to take place, showcasing iconic football figures like Barry Sanders and Calvin Johnson, alongside other revered Detroit Lions alumni and current players. This exclusive gathering offers fans a rare opportunity to interact with these legendary players and current team members in a unique setting.

news.headline: USDT introduced to UAE property market by Tether and Reelly Tech, enabling use of USDt to buy real estate via 30,000 agents.
news.summary: Tether, a prominent cryptocurrency company, has joined forces with a new partner in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) to provide a unique possibility to utilize USDt for buying real estate. This collaboration will enable individuals to access 30,000 properties through both local and international property agents using the stablecoin USDt.

news.headline: Tapestry Stock Soars on Q2 Earnings: Revenue hits $2.2B, up 5% YoY, but misses on adjusted earnings at $1.39/share.
news.summary: Tapestry Inc (NYSE: TPR) saw a rise in shares following the release of their second-quarter results. The company, which owns Coach, Kate Spade, and Stuart Weitzman brands, reported revenue of $2.2 billion for the quarter, surpassing analyst expectations of $2.11 billion. However, their adjusted earnings per share fell short of estimates at $1.39 compared to the anticipated $1.75. Overall, total revenue increased by 5% compared to the previous year, with significant growth in Europe at 42%, followed by 4% in North America and 1% elsewhere. For further details, visit a reliable financial news source.

news.headline: Saviynt reports record results in 2024, with record revenues and contracted ARR, proving a successful year for the company.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Saviynt, a prominent provider of cloud-native identity and governance platform solutions, recently disclosed their year-end financial and operating outcomes. The report highlighted record revenues and contracted Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR). Their Identity Cloud, an innovative cloud-native platform, is revolutionizing identity security through enhanced visibility, control, and intelligence for identity management. A spokesperson expressed, "The company experienced a significant milestone in 2024 with outstanding performance across all areas."

news.headline: Trump's peace plan for Ukraine is leaked by The Daily Mail—Sources on X.
ClariMed Inc. opens advanced research facility in UK, enhancing human factors research; 45 mins from London.
news.summary: In Chadds Ford, Pennsylvania on February 6, 2025, ClariMed, Inc. unveiled its state-of-the-art simulated use research facility in Cambridge, UK. The premier medical device development and regulatory services company's new facility is conveniently situated only 45 minutes away from downtown London. This marks a significant advancement in the company's commitment to innovation and research in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Pakistan construction industry projected to shrink by 4.4% in 2024, facing challenges like rising govt debt and inflation.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on the Pakistan Construction Market by ResearchAndMarkets.com indicates a projected 4.4% contraction in real terms in 2024. Factors contributing to this decline include increasing government debt, political instability, fluctuating economic strategies, high inflation rates, and escalating construction costs. The report covers various sectors including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets, providing insights and forecasts up to 2028. This analysis offers a comprehensive overview of the challenges and trends in Pakistan's construction industry.

news.headline: Employment Hero achieves $200M ARR, plans to introduce new tech to Canadian job solutions.
news.summary: A significant achievement in its expansion, Employment Hero revealed today that it has exceeded $200 million in annualized recurring revenue. The company, based in Toronto, announced this major milestone in its growth journey.

news.headline: MSG Entertainment reported Q2 2025 earnings with $407.42 million revenue (1% YoY growth), beating estimates. 1.1 million holiday tickets sold. EPS missed estimates at $1.56 instead of $2.16.
news.summary: Madison Square Garden Entertainment Corp (NYSE:MSGE) released its fiscal second-quarter 2025 results on Thursday. The company experienced a 1% year-on-year revenue growth, reaching $407.42 million, which surpassed the analyst consensus projection of $401.76 million. However, the earnings per share (EPS) stood at $1.56, falling short of the analyst consensus of $2.16. In its 91st holiday season, approximately 1.1 million tickets were sold across 200 shows, an increase from the previous season's sales of over 1 million tickets from 193 shows. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ERS electronic inaugurates new production and R&D facility in Barbing, Germany for advanced packaging, enhancing semiconductor manufacturing solutions.
news.summary: In Barbing, Germany, on February 6, 2025, ERS electronic, a top provider of thermal management solutions for semiconductor manufacturing, marked the grand opening of ERS Barbing. This new facility integrates production and research & development activities, showcasing advanced technology.

news.headline: CPSC announces recalls by TravisMathew due to burn hazard for women's sweatshirts and men's/women's hoodies. Visit www.cpsc.gov for more info.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) released a statement regarding recalls in cooperation with various firms. TravisMathew is recalling women's sweatshirts and men's and women's hoodies due to a burn hazard, which is in violation of safety regulations. Consumers are urged to visit www.cpsc.gov for more information on these recalls.

news.headline: Snap-On Inc. reported Q4 net sales of $1.1987 billion, up 0.2% YoY with a gross margin of 49.7%. CEO mentioned challenges in vehicle repair complexities.
news.summary: Snap-On Inc. (NYSE:SNA) shares are down following the release of their fourth-quarter 2024 results. Quarterly net sales hit $1.1987 billion, up 0.2% from the previous year and surpassing the anticipated $1.197 billion. $2 million of the sales increase was organic, with an additional $2.1 million from acquisitions, offset by a $2 million negative impact from foreign exchange. The gross margin saw a 146 basis points increase to 49.7%, leading to a 3.2% rise in gross profit to $596.1 million. In the same quarter, financial services revenue stood at $100.5 million.

news.headline: Intrust IT in Cincinnati acquires IT Support Division of Entegrity Consulting Group in Dayton effective January 1st, 2025.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, Intrust IT based in Cincinnati, Ohio announced the successful acquisition of the IT support division of Entegrity Consulting Group located in Dayton, Ohio. The acquisition was finalized on January 1, 2025, marking a strategic move to strengthen Intrust IT's foothold in the region, expanding its presence in both Cincinnati and Dayton.

news.headline: Autoport reaches rezoning appeal milestone for Uwharrie Motorsports Park in NC, expects 1H 2025 groundbreaking.
news.summary: In Moore County, North Carolina, on February 6, 2025, Autoport has shared that Uwharrie Motorsports Park & Resort is progressing according to schedule after the successful conclusion of the rezoning appeal phase. The groundbreaking for the project is expected to take place in the first half of 2025, marking a crucial milestone in this development.

news.headline: Iraq Construction market to grow by 5% in 2024, with investments in transportation, energy, and housing infrastructure.
news.summary: A recent report on the Iraq construction market projects a 5% growth in real terms in 2024. The market analysis covers sectors such as commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential. This growth is attributed to investments from both public and private sectors in transportation, renewable energy, and housing infrastructure. The report titled "Iraq Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector - Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional and Residential Market Analysis to 2028 (H2 2024)" has been made available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. This growth signifies opportunities for development and expansion, highlighting a positive outlook for the construction industry in Iraq.

news.headline: Trump: We're making progress to stop Russia-Ukraine war.
Knightscope expands its federal presence, deploys robots in Washington D.C. after success with U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs and U.S. Air Force, achieving FedRAMP® authorization.
news.summary: Mountain View-based Knightscope, Inc. (Nasdaq: KSCP), known for its autonomous security robots and AI solutions, has revealed major developments. This includes securing a Phase 1 contract with the U.S. Air Force, deploying robots at the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs, and obtaining full FedRAMP® authorization for federal expansion. In addition to these milestones, the company has established operations in Washington D.C. through government relations firm Washington Office.

news.headline: Air Products reported Q1 2025 sales down 2.2% to $2.931 billion, with EPS at $2.86 (+1% YoY) and higher dividends. Optimistic outlook for 2025.
news.summary: Air Products & Chemicals Inc. (NYSE:APD) announced a 2.2% year-over-year decrease in first-quarter 2025 sales, amounting to $2.931 billion, which missed the anticipated $2.94 billion consensus. The decline can be attributed to lower volumes (down 2%) and adverse currency effects (down 1%), offset slightly by increased pricing (up 1%). Factors like the LNG divestiture and weakened demand in Europe contributed to the drop in volumes. Adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at $2.86, marking a 1% increase from the previous year and surpassing the predicted $2.85. Sales across segments were recorded at $1.287 billion for the Americas (up 3% YoY) and $697 million for Europe... Further details are available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: PARENTS reveals winners of 2025 Best Family Cars Awards: 24 winners across hybrids, SUVs, luxury sedans, with Toyota, Ford, Cadillac, Chevrolet among top cars.
news.summary: This year's top cars have been announced by PARENTS, featuring 24 winners in categories such as hybrids, SUVs, luxury sedans, entertainment, and technology systems. Toyota, Ford, Cadillac, and Chevrolet are among the honored companies. The awards were given in New York and Chicago on February 6, 2025.

news.headline: Cole Haan introduces new era of footwear & accessories with cutting-edge ergonomics & style for spring.
news.summary: An esteemed American brand is launching a fresh line of footwear and accessories that merge advanced ergonomics with chic style on Feb. 6, 2025, in New York. Cole Haan is ushering in a new era with a global campaign titled "Innovation That Moves," capturing the essence of the brand's bold energy. The collection showcases groundbreaking designs and combines comfort with trendsetting aesthetics, appealing to a wide audience. This release is set to make a significant impact in the fashion industry, with the brand aiming to reach a vast demographic with its innovative approach.

news.headline: KKR predicts a shift in markets as public and private sectors merge, comparing it to the 'iPhone moment'.
GLOBE NEWSWIRE: Digital Tails Group, LLC and bowmo™ complete project for European client Téchne.
news.summary: In New York City on February 6, 2025, bowmo™, Inc. (OTC: BOMO), a company utilizing AI and XR/VR technologies to deliver tailored SaaS Platforms across various sectors, has disclosed the successful conclusion of a recent client venture for Téchne, a European bespoke furniture maker. This project was developed in collaboration with OWNverse/Digital Tails Group (“DTG”) following their merger. Bowmo aims to provide fully customizable solutions to different industries via their website (https://bowmo.com).

news.headline: Feb 6, 2025 - Watch Bloomberg Surveillance TV for the latest market updates and analysis.
Marvia introduces Social Campaigns, first of its kind combining hyperlocal social media with creative automation for multi-location brands.
news.summary: In New York, Marvia has launched Social Campaigns, the first of its kind in the world, merging hyperlocal social media with creative automation for multi-location brands. This innovative solution aims to streamline brand management and boost engagement on a large scale.

news.headline: Hyundai Ioniq 5 N voted as top vehicle by 2025 MAMA Awards, chosen by 200 media experts who tested 100+ cars.
news.summary: In Chicago, the Midwest Automotive Media Association (MAMA) has named the Hyundai Ioniq 5 N as the winner of the 2025 MAMA’s Favorite Vehicle Awards. Chosen by almost 200 automotive media professionals who tested more than 100 vehicles at key events like the MAMA Spring Rally, Favorites Fall Fest, and Chicago Drives Electric, this recognition highlights the excellence of the Hyundai model. The MAMA Awards celebrate outstanding vehicles, with the Hyundai Ioniq 5 N standing out from a diverse range of new, redesigned, and updated vehicles experienced in 2024.

news.headline: Impressive results show significant revenue increase and strong profitability.
Everything Blockchain, Inc. reduces 3 million shares, enhancing shareholder value; 10% of total shares cancelled.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, Everything Blockchain, Inc. (OTCMKTS: EBZT) revealed the elimination of 3 million common stock shares, which accounts for about 10% of its overall shares outstanding. The company, emphasizing the combination of AI, blockchain, and cryptocurrency, made this decision to streamline its stock structure.

news.headline: Silicon Motion achieves ASPICE CL3 for automotive SSD controllers, marking a significant milestone in the industry.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 6, 2025, Silicon Motion Technology Corporation, a prominent player in the industry known for designing and selling NAND flash controllers for solid-state storage devices, unveiled its latest achievement. The company, listed on NasdaqGS as SIMO, proudly introduced its cutting-edge PCIe Gen4 SSD controller. This development signifies a significant step forward in the sector, showcasing Silicon Motion's dedication to innovation and excellence.

news.headline: Dr. Dermot Cotter will present research on industrial refrigeration energy efficiency at IOR TechTalk in Glasgow on Feb. 6, 2025.
news.summary: Scheduled to take place in GLASGOW, Scotland on Feb. 6, 2025, a webinar will delve into findings from site surveys focusing on technologies, energy efficiency, and maintenance practices within the food, drink, chemical, and pharmaceutical industries. Led by Dr. Dermot Cotter, MD of Star Refrigeration, the webinar aims to offer valuable insights gathered from these surveys.

news.headline: Treasury Secretary Bessent prioritizes fiscal discipline & private-sector growth. Focus on reducing spending, cutting regulations, and driving sustainable expansion. Trump administration focusing on shifting growth to private-sector investment. Emphasizes importance of lower long-term interest rates and 10-year Treasury yield. Read more on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent reaffirmed the Trump administration's focus on reducing government spending, cutting regulations, and boosting private-sector growth. Bessent emphasized the need for fiscal discipline and shifting from government-driven stimuli to private-sector investments. He highlighted the importance of addressing overspending in Washington and promoting pro-business policies for sustainable economic expansion. Bessent also discussed the administration's attention to bond yields and long-term interest rates, particularly focusing on the 10-year Treasury yield as a key indicator for economic trends. The article implies a shift towards a more privatized economy and a commitment to lower government spending and regulations.

news.headline: Sonos (NASDAQ: SONO) exceeded earnings estimates by 112.9% with an EPS of $0.64 in Q1 2025.
news.summary: Sonos (NASDAQ:SONO) released its Q1 earnings report on February 6, 2025, at 08:30 AM. The company exceeded earnings expectations by an impressive 112.99999999999999%, with an EPS of $0.64 compared to the anticipated figure. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Philip Morris Q4 earnings beat estimates, with revenue up 7.3% to $9.71B. Smoke-free sales rose to 40% of total revenue. EPS $1.55.
news.summary: Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE:PM) saw its shares rise following the release of its fourth-quarter FY24 earnings report. The company experienced a 7.3% year-on-year revenue growth, reaching $9.71 billion, surpassing the anticipated $9.44 billion as per analysts' consensus. The smoke-free segment contributed 40% to the total net revenues, showing an increase of 0.7 percentage points compared to the same period the previous year. Shipments of Cigarette and Heated Tobacco units (HTU) in the fourth quarter also increased by 1.9% year-on-year, with HTUs and cigarettes growing by 5.1% and 1.1%, respectively. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at $1.55, outperforming the expected $1.50. Moreover, the adjusted operating margin for the quarter expanded from 33.7% to 36.3%.

news.headline: Skyworks faces a 'nightmare realized' after Apple's setback; financial losses amount to millions.
